title: elymus × apiculatus
intro: Elymus × apiculatus, also known as intermediate wheatgrass, is a hybrid of two grass species and is considered a perennial cool-season grass. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. Intermediate wheatgrass has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as possibly aiding in weight loss and improving overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as juice, tea, or supplement capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a health food.
